homepage.heroSubline: Durable, reliable fencing solutions built for the city that never sleeps. Expert installation and repair services.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Forged in Steel
aboutText: Citation Fence Company started with a simple goal: to provide New York City with fencing solutions that are as tough and resilient as the city itself. We're a family-owned and operated business, deeply rooted in the five boroughs and committed to serving our neighbors.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, assess the specific challenges of your property, and deliver a fence that meets your requirements and exceeds your expectations. We use only premium materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting quality and security.

We believe in giving back to the community that has supported us for over a decade. We actively participate in local initiatives and strive to be a responsible and ethical business partner for all of our clients.

valueProps.title: Unwavering Quality
valueProps.description: We source the highest-grade materials to withstand the harsh New York climate and constant wear and tear.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our skilled team ensures precise and secure installation, guaranteeing the longevity and performance of your fence.

valueProps.title: Custom Solutions
valueProps.description: We tailor every project to your unique needs and aesthetic preferences, offering a wide range of styles and materials.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: From initial consultation to final inspection, we provide clear communication and dependable support.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote and experience the Citation Fence Company difference.

services.name: Chain Link Fencing
services.shortDescription: Affordable and durable security solutions for any property.
services.description:
Chain link fencing remains a practical and cost-effective choice for securing properties throughout New York City. Ideal for residential, commercial, and industrial applications, it offers a robust barrier against intrusion and defines property lines with clarity. We use galvanized steel to combat the city's harsh weather conditions, ensuring longevity and resistance to rust and corrosion.

Our chain link fence installations are meticulously planned and executed, accounting for the unique challenges of urban environments. We handle everything from initial site surveys and permitting to precise post setting and fabric tensioning. We offer a variety of heights, gauges, and mesh sizes to meet specific security needs.

Beyond basic security, we provide options like vinyl coating for enhanced aesthetics and privacy slats for increased screening. Whether you need a simple boundary fence or a high-security perimeter, Citation Fence Company delivers chain link solutions that are built to last and perform reliably.
process: Step 1: Site assessment and consultation to determine your specific needs and property layout.
Step 2: Material selection and customization to match your aesthetic preferences and security requirements.
Step 3: Professional installation with precise measurements and secure anchoring.
Step 4: Final inspection and client approval to ensure complete satisfaction.
benefits: Durable and long-lasting in harsh conditions

faq.question: How long does chain link fencing last in NYC?
faq.answer: With proper galvanization and occasional maintenance, a chain link fence can easily last 20-30 years in New York City.

faq.question: Can I add privacy to a chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of privacy slats that can be easily installed to enhance screening and reduce visibility through the fence.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for chain link fencing in NYC?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the height and location of the fence. We can assist you with the permitting process to ensure compliance with local regulations.

services.name: Wood Fencing
services.shortDescription: Classic style and natural beauty for residential properties.
services.description:
Wood fencing offers a timeless appeal and natural warmth that complements the diverse architectural styles found throughout New York City’s neighborhoods. From classic picket fences in Brooklyn brownstone districts to privacy fences in Queens suburban areas, wood provides both aesthetic charm and functional security.

We use pressure-treated lumber to withstand the city's fluctuating temperatures and humidity levels, preventing rot and decay. Our experienced carpenters craft each fence with precision and attention to detail, ensuring a structurally sound and visually appealing result.

Choose from a variety of wood types, styles, and finishes to create a fence that reflects your personal taste and enhances your property's curb appeal. We offer traditional picket fences, solid board privacy fences, and custom designs tailored to your specific needs. We also handle staining and sealing to protect your investment and prolong the life of your wood fence.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to choose the wood type, style, and finish that best suits your property.
Step 2: Professional installation with precise post setting and secure panel attachment.
Step 3: Staining and sealing to protect the wood from the elements and enhance its natural beauty.
Step 4: Final inspection and client approval to ensure complete satisfaction.
benefits: Customizable designs to match your style

faq.question: How often does a wood fence need to be stained or sealed?
faq.answer: In New York City's climate, we recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from moisture and UV damage.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fencing in NYC?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine is a popular and cost-effective choice for wood fencing in NYC due to its resistance to rot and insects. Cedar is another excellent option known for its natural durability and beauty.

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a well-constructed wood fence can last 15-20 years or more.

services.name: Vinyl Fencing
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance and stylish fencing for modern homes.
services.description:
Vinyl fencing offers a clean, modern look and exceptional durability, making it an ideal choice for homeowners in New York City who value both aesthetics and low maintenance. Resistant to rot, decay, and insect damage, vinyl fences require minimal upkeep and maintain their pristine appearance for years to come.

We offer a wide range of vinyl fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and decorative accent fences, to complement any architectural design. Our vinyl fences are manufactured using high-quality materials and advanced extrusion technology, ensuring strength, stability, and resistance to fading and cracking.

Installation is quick and efficient, minimizing disruption to your property. We handle all aspects of the project, from site preparation to final inspection, ensuring a seamless and hassle-free experience. Enjoy the beauty and convenience of vinyl fencing with Citation Fence Company.
process: Step 1: Selection of vinyl fence style and color to match your home's aesthetic.
Step 2: Precise site measurement and layout to ensure accurate installation.
Step 3: Professional installation with secure post setting and panel assembly.
Step 4: Final inspection and client approval to ensure complete satisfaction.
benefits: Low maintenance and easy to clean
Variety of styles and colors available

faq.question: How do I clean a vinyl fence?
faq.answer: Vinyl fences can be easily cleaned with soap and water or a mild detergent. For stubborn stains, use a vinyl fence cleaner.

faq.question: Will a vinyl fence fade in the sun?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fences are manufactured with UV inhibitors to prevent fading and discoloration. They will maintain their color and appearance for many years.

faq.question: Is vinyl fencing environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Vinyl fencing is recyclable and can be made from recycled materials, making it an environmentally responsible choice.

services.name: Aluminum Fencing
services.shortDescription: Elegant and rust-proof fencing for pools and property lines.
services.description:
Aluminum fencing combines classic elegance with exceptional durability, making it a popular choice for pool enclosures, property perimeters, and decorative accents throughout New York City. Unlike iron, aluminum is naturally rust-proof, ensuring a long-lasting and low-maintenance fencing solution.

We offer a wide range of aluminum fence styles, from traditional ornamental designs to sleek, modern styles, to complement any architectural aesthetic. Our aluminum fences are powder-coated for added protection and a smooth, durable finish.

Aluminum fencing is lightweight and easy to install, minimizing disruption to your property. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and permitting to installation and final inspection, ensuring a seamless and hassle-free experience. Enhance the beauty and security of your property with aluminum fencing from Citation Fence Company.
process: Step 1: Design consultation to select the aluminum fence style and color that best suits your property.
Step 2: Precise site measurement and layout to ensure accurate installation.
Step 3: Professional installation with secure post setting and panel assembly.
Step 4: Final inspection and client approval to ensure complete satisfaction.
benefits: Low maintenance and easy to clean

faq.question: Is aluminum fencing suitable for pool enclosures?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fencing is an excellent choice for pool enclosures because it is rust-proof and meets most pool safety codes.

faq.question: Can I customize the color of my aluminum fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of powder-coated colors to match your home's exterior.

faq.question: How strong is aluminum fencing?
faq.answer: Aluminum fencing is surprisingly strong and durable, providing excellent security and protection for your property.

services.name: Fence Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Extending the life of your fence with expert repairs.
services.description:
Even the most durable fences can succumb to the wear and tear of New York City's harsh weather conditions and occasional accidents. Citation Fence Company offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services to ensure the longevity and performance of your investment.

Our experienced technicians are skilled in repairing all types of fences, including wood, chain link, vinyl, and aluminum. We handle everything from minor repairs, such as replacing broken boards or tightening loose posts, to major repairs, such as rebuilding sections damaged by storms or accidents.

We also provide preventative maintenance services, such as staining and sealing wood fences, to protect them from the elements and prolong their lifespan. Regular maintenance can help prevent costly repairs down the road. Trust Citation Fence Company to keep your fence in top condition.
process: Step 1: Thorough inspection to assess the extent of the damage and identify the root cause.
Step 2: Detailed repair plan and cost estimate.
Step 3: Professional repairs using high-quality materials and proven techniques.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repairs are completed to your satisfaction.
benefits: Extends the life of your fence
Enhances the security of your property
Maintains the aesthetic appeal of your fence

faq.question: How often should I inspect my fence for damage?
faq.answer: We recommend inspecting your fence at least twice a year, especially after severe weather events.

faq.question: Can you repair a leaning fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair leaning fences by resetting the posts and reinforcing the foundation.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency fence repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency fence repair services for situations that pose a security risk or safety hazard.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gates for every property.
services.description:
A well-designed and properly functioning gate is essential for security, convenience, and curb appeal. Citation Fence Company specializes in gate installation and repair services for residential and commercial properties throughout New York City.

We offer a wide range of gate styles, including swing gates, sliding gates, and automatic gates, to meet your specific needs and preferences. Our gates are constructed using high-quality materials and are designed to withstand the rigors of daily use.

We also provide gate repair services, including hinge replacement, latch repair, and operator repair. Our experienced technicians can diagnose and resolve any gate issue quickly and efficiently. Ensure the security and functionality of your property with gate installation and repair services from Citation Fence Company.
process: Step 1: Consultation to determine your gate needs and preferences.
Step 2: Design and material selection.
Step 3: Professional installation with precise alignment and secure hardware.
Step 4: Final inspection and testing to ensure smooth and reliable operation.

faq.question: Do you install automatic gates?
faq.answer: Yes, we install a wide range of automatic gate systems, including swing gate operators and sliding gate operators.

faq.question: Can you repair my existing gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair all types of gates, including wood, metal, and vinyl gates.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install a gate?
faq.answer: The cost of gate installation varies depending on the style, size, and materials used. Contact us for a free estimate.

serviceAreas.content:
Citation Fence Company is proud to offer its comprehensive fence services to the residents and businesses of New York City. From the bustling streets of Manhattan to the vibrant neighborhoods of Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, and Staten Island, we are committed to providing top-quality fencing solutions tailored to the unique needs of each community.

We understand the diverse architectural styles and property requirements across the five boroughs. Whether you need a classic wrought iron fence for a brownstone in Brooklyn, a secure chain-link fence for a commercial property in Queens, or a decorative wooden fence for a backyard in Staten Island, our experienced team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results. Citation Fence Company uses only the highest quality materials and employs skilled craftsmen to ensure that your fence is not only aesthetically pleasing but also durable and long-lasting.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Citation Fence Company did an excellent job installing my new wood fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! They even cleaned up everything after they were done. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Had a section of my chain link fence damaged by a fallen tree branch. Citation Fence Company came out quickly and repaired it perfectly. Good price and great service.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We absolutely love our new vinyl fence! It's exactly what we wanted, and the installation process was smooth and stress-free. The team was very helpful in helping us choose the right style for our home.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: Citation Fence Company installed an aluminum fence around my pool, and it looks amazing. The quality of the fence is top-notch, and the installation was done perfectly. Very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Susan M.
reviews.text: My gate was sticking and difficult to open. Citation Fence Company came out and fixed it quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and professional.

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Great experience with Citation Fence Company. They repaired my old wood fence and made it look like new again. The price was fair, and the work was excellent.
